title: Resolution Temporarily Suspending the Implementation of Ordinance No. 2020-2074 Entitled ?an Ordinance Adopting Executive Order No. 217 Series of 2020, Dated November 5, 2020, an Order Prescribing the Guidelines and the Conduct of Funeral Wake or Funeral Vigil in Municipality of Los Baños and Effectively Repealing Ordinance No. 2020-2016? in View of the Conduct of Funeral Wake or Funeral Vigil of Honorable Mayor Caesar P.
